paper_title: GeneChip Data Analysis and Transcriptome Analysis of Apical Growth

methods.description: This method involves analyzing scanned arrays using Affymetrix GCOS 1.4 software to obtain Absent/Present calls, followed by further analysis with dChip 2006 and Partek Genomics Suite for principal component analysis and hierarchical clustering.

steps.description: Scanned arrays were first analyzed with Affymetrix GCOS 1.4 software to obtain Absent/Present calls using the MAS5 detection algorithm.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze scanned arrays with Affymetrix GCOS 1.4 to obtain Absent/Present calls

steps.description: The 16 arrays used in this study were analyzed with dChip 2006 with no filter for high variation within the replicates.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze arrays with dChip 2006 without high variation filter

steps.description: Annotations were obtained from the NetAffx database as of July 2007.
Expression data obtained with dChip were imported into Partek Genomics Suite 6.07 for 3D principal component analysis and hierarchical clustering.
steps.searchable_summary: Import data into Partek Genomics Suite for PCA and clustering

steps.description: Results of PCA analysis were visualized as scatter plots using Origin 9.
steps.searchable_summary: Visualize PCA results as scatter plots in Origin 9

methods.description: This method involves using DAVID for enrichment analysis of Gene Ontology terms and functional annotation clustering to identify significant GO terms.

steps.description: Functional annotation tools of DAVID were employed for enrichment analysis of Gene Ontology (GO) terms with specific thresholds.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform GO term enrichment analysis using DAVID

steps.description: Genes comprising enriched GO terms were subjected to functional annotation clustering followed by manual analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: Cluster and manually analyze enriched GO terms

methods.description: This method involves comparative analysis of transcriptomes to identify genes with enriched expression in apical growing cells and validation using RT-PCR.

steps.description: Comparative analysis identified 277 genes as showing enriched expression in apical growing cells.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify genes with enriched expression in apical growing cells

steps.description: RT-PCR analysis was performed for eleven apical growth selective transcripts.
steps.searchable_summary: Validate apical growth transcripts using RT-PCR

methods.description: This method involves analyzing promoter regions of apical growth selective genes to identify conserved cis-regulatory elements using motif discovery tools.

steps.description: Promoter sequence analysis was performed using Musa and Promzea to identify conserved motifs.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify conserved motifs in promoter regions using Musa and Promzea

steps.description: The sequence consensus for each motif detected by Promzea was compared to known plant promoter database by STAMP.
steps.searchable_summary: Compare motif consensus to plant promoter database using STAMP
